invalidRange.title: We could not generate that report.

filterBar.helperText: Review production performance, downtime impact, and line status over the selected period.

averageSpeed.label: Average speed
averageSpeed.tooltip: Average units per minute across the selected report range.

totalProduced.label: Total produced
totalProduced.tooltip: Total units counted during the selected range, including both good and rejected output.

averagePerformance.label: Average performance
averagePerformance.tooltip: Average actual line speed as a share of the configured target speed.

emptyState.title: No production activity in this range
emptyState.description: The selected period appears to contain only scheduled stop time. Try a weekday or a broader range to surface running and downtime events.

statusTimeline.title: Line status over selected range
statusTimeline.helperText: Hover a segment to see its time window and cause.

downtime.title: Most common downtime events
downtime.noEventsText: No downtime events occurred during the selected range.

tooltips.availability: Availability is runtime divided by planned production time. Planned downtime is excluded.
tooltips.quality: Quality is good output divided by total produced output.
tooltips.oee: Overall equipment effectiveness calculated as availability multiplied by performance multiplied by quality.
tooltips.currentBlock: Length of the current running, downtime, or stopped block.
tooltips.currentCause: Primary reason attached to the current downtime or delay block.
tooltips.unplannedDowntime: Total time lost to unplanned downtime during the selected range.
tooltips.plannedDowntime: Total time spent in planned downtime during the selected range.
tooltips.rankedByImpact: Downtime causes are ordered by total lost time across the selected range.
